category_sources: source_facts.description: Read and write data matrix barcodes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives dmtx-utils; source_facts.homepage is the matching official GitHub repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the best supplied documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/dmtx/dmtx-utils; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Data Matrix barcode read/write utilities; source_facts.executables lists dmtxquery, dmtxread, and dmtxwrite.
